title: Control-M Resource Pool Queue Depth Saturation
dataSources: Control-M job status events including `resource_pool` and wait states
app: Control-M/EM export with pool binding fields
spl:
index=cicd sourcetype="controlm:job"
| where status="Wait Resource" OR status="Wait Host"
| stats dc(job_id) as waiting_jobs, values(resource_pool) as pools by controlm_server
| where waiting_jobs>=10
| sort -waiting_jobs
description: Resource pools backing up indicate host shortage or mis-sized concurrency limits.
value: Helps batch ops add hosts or rebalance pools before grid lock.
implementation: Ensure `resource_pool` extracted from XML/JSON order definitions.
knownFalsePositives: Busy or odd job states during code moves, new folder cutovers, one-off re-runs, or test folders still mixed into production; compare with the scheduler before you change how jobs are defined.
grandmaExplanation: We watch pools and queues piling up, so we add capacity or spread work before one busy pipe blocks a whole class of jobs.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• Install and configure: Control-M/EM export with pool binding fields.
• Data: Control-M job status events including `resource_pool` and wait states.
• For directory layout and inputs, see docs/implementation-guide.md.

Step 1 — Configure data collection
Ensure `resource_pool` extracted from XML/JSON order definitions.

Step 2 — Create the search and alert
Run the following search (then save as report or alert; tune time range and threshold):

```spl
index=cicd sourcetype="controlm:job"
| where status="Wait Resource" OR status="Wait Host"
| stats dc(job_id) as waiting_jobs, values(resource_pool) as pools by controlm_server
| where waiting_jobs>=10
| sort -waiting_jobs
```

Understanding this search
Resource pools backing up indicate host shortage or mis-sized concurrency limits.

Step 3 — Validate
Compare with the Control-M job plan and run history in the job scheduler. Reconcile job and folder names, start and end times, and queue or pool use for a few highlighted jobs.

Step 4 — Operationalize
Add to a dashboard, wire alert actions, and document ownership. Suggested view: Single value (waiting_jobs), Bar chart (by pool).
